name: Anal verge
definition: External anal opening used as the start landmark for AGD measures.
notes: Must be paired with subject position and handling conditions.

name: Posterior scrotal base
definition: Posterior junction of scrotal tissue and perineal skin.

name: Clitoris
definition: External clitoral landmark used as endpoint for AGD_AC.
notes: Requires privacy and ethics review for human neonatal or clinical contexts.

name: Nasion or species-equivalent
definition: Midline craniofacial reference point or documented species-equivalent.
notes: Equivalence class must be stated for non-human comparisons.

name: Rostral tip
definition: Anterior-most snout or face landmark used for snout length.
notes: Photographic measures require scale marker and angle metadata.

name: Occipitofrontal circumference path
definition: Head circumference path passing over occipital and frontal reference points.
species_scope: human neonatal aggregate or controlled protocol
notes: Public repository accepts aggregate or synthetic values only.
